title: Scotch-Brite Stainless Steel Scourer, 12 Pieces - Rust Resistant Spiral Metal Scourer, Powerful and Effective Clean Scrubbing pad
features: Powerful and effective clean: Scotch-Brite Steel Scrubber cuts through most stubborn dirt and removes tough soil & burnt-on food FAST!
Stainless steel: long-lasting scrubbing performance thanks to the high quality 100% stainless steel
Ideal for cleaning: cast-iron pots, pans, stove burners, garden tools and grills
This spiral steel scourer is rust resistant and can also be used outside the kitchen (e.g. for cleaning garden tools, rusted fences).
This stainless steel pad can scratch delicate surfaces, so it should not be used on non-stick appliances, glass, or other fragile surfaces. For these, we recommend Scotch-Brite Delicate Scrub Sponge.
The box contains 2 x Pack of 6, altogether 12 scrubbers
description: From the manufacturer DISCOVER SCOTCH-BRITE POWERFUL INOX SPIRAL Scotch-Brite Stainless Steel Spiral are made for the toughest cleaning tasks. 100% stainless steel removes tough soil and burnt-on food FAST! It is long lasting and rust-free. Feel the benefit of more than 60 years’ experience of developing cleaning products, with Scotch-Brite. High quality 100% stainless steel. Dedicated for the most toughest burnt & baked on messes. Long lasting & rust free. Stainless Steel Spiral Bathroom Scrub Sponge Delicate Non-Scratch Scrub Sponge​ Fresh Non-Scratch Nailsaver Scrub Sponge​ Classic Heavy Duty Scrub Sponge​ Extreme Scrub Sponge​ Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.5 out of 5 stars 3 4.5 out of 5 stars 430 4.6 out of 5 stars 1,262 4.4 out of 5 stars 113 4.6 out of 5 stars 194 4.6 out of 5 stars 342 Pieces in Pack 2 12 12 16 16 12 Feature Removes tough soil and burnt-on food Gentle, effective and fast cleaning Cleans without causing unsightly or damaging scratches​ Doesn’t trap food & easily rinses clean Cuts through grease and burnt-on food​ Effectively removes tough dirt and stains​ Format Spiral Sponge Sponge Sponge Sponge Sponge Ergonomic design to protect your fingernails during cleaning no data ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Recommended usage Ideal for cast-iron pots, pans, stove burners, garden tools and grills​ Great for cleaning pots and pans, including non-stick cookware and glass Great for cleaning pots and pans, including non-stick cookware and glass​ Ideal for cleaning sticky food leftovers; even eggs and melted cheese don’t stick to scrubbing surface​ Ideal for grease and burnt-on food, pots, pans, leaving overnight dishes spotless​ Ideal for cleaning pots, pans, grills and oven trays​
